headline: How The Criteo (CRTO) Narrative Is Shifting With Lower Targets And GenAI Expectations
summary: Criteo’s updated analyst narrative centers on a fair value price target reset from $35.75 to about $29.95, a reduction of roughly 16% in the latest model. That move lines up with Street research, where several firms have trimmed targets by single digit and double digit dollar amounts, reflecting more cautious assumptions that still differ in how they frame risk and opportunity. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets and viewpoints can help you track the evolving story and...

headline: Morgan Stanley's Bitcoin ETF Gets Official Listing Announcement By NYSE: Analyst Says This 'Typically' Means Launch Imminent
summary: NYSE Arca greenlit Morgan Stanley’s application on Wednesday to list shares of a spot Bitcoin exchange-traded fund. Another Bitcoin ETF On Wall Street The exchange certified its approval for the “listing and registration” of Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust under the ticker MSBT, according to the latest SEC filing. Bloomberg senior ETF analyst Eric Balchunas predicted an “imminent” launch following the listing announcement. Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF $MSBT got an official listing announcement from N

headline: How The Jet2 (AIM:JET2) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analysts Recalibrate Valuation Targets
summary: Jet2’s updated fair value estimate has shifted from £17.32 to £16.61, a reduction of around 4% that puts the model closer to the latest Street targets clustered in the £13.25 to £14.00 range. This adjustment sits alongside analysts trimming prior targets such as £14.50 while largely keeping ratings like Neutral and Equal Weight. This keeps the spotlight on valuation assumptions rather than a new view of the business. Read on to see how these moves fit into the evolving narrative around Jet2...

headline: When do higher oil prices shift risk from inflation to growth?
summary: Investing.com -- Higher oil prices are emerging as a central risk variable for the U.S. economy, with the balance between inflation and growth being determined by the conflict in the Middle East, Morgan Stanley acknowledged in a note to clients on Friday.

headline: Wall Street’s FX Roadmap Roiled by Dollar’s Best Run Since July
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The dollar is on track for its best month since July as the conflict in the Middle East scrambles Wall Street’s playbook for the world’s dominant reserve currency.The Bloomberg Dollar Spot Index is up about 2.6% in March, buoyed by haven flows and diminished expectations for Federal Reserve interest-rate cuts after the war caused energy prices to soar. It marks a sharp reversal for the greenback, which on the eve of the conflict had just logged its fourth straight losing month. As

headline: Claude AI Maker Anthropic Considers IPO as Soon as October
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Anthropic PBC is considering going public as soon as in October, according to people familiar with the matter, as the artificial intelligence company races with rival OpenAI Inc. to hold an initial public offering.The maker of the popular Claude chatbot has had early discussions with Wall Street banks about taking leading roles on a potential listing, the people said, asking not to be identified as the information isn’t public.
